author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Extract shared JSON error-envelope test assertions

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: integration specs duplicate JSON error-envelope parsing and assertions. Representative copies: tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts:12 JsonErrorEnvelope and :24 parseJsonErrorEnvelope; tests/integration/release-readiness-runtime.spec.ts:71 JsonErrorEnvelope and :83 parseJsonErrorEnvelope; tests/integration/help-runtime.spec.ts repeats raw JSON.parse(stderr) envelope assertions around :88, :414, :473, :550, :654, :700, :728, :786, and :861.

A shared parseJsonErrorEnvelope and/or expectJsonError helper covers stderr JSON envelope assertions; repeated local envelope types/parsers are removed; tests still assert code/type/exit_code/detail/next_steps where relevant; targeted integration tests and pnpm build pass.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search 'JsonErrorEnvelope parseJsonErrorEnvelope stderr JSON error envelope integration tests' found no active exact item; pm-eltf does not cover stderr contract assertions.

message: Create duplicate-audit finding for JSON error-envelope test helper
